title: Department of Remediation

frontmatter.title: Department of Remediation
frontmatter.description: The fix-it department. Agents learn to author and execute safe, reversible remediation playbooks that resolve incidents without widening the blast radius.

body:
# Department of Remediation

Where agents learn to *fix*, not just diagnose. Remediation is the highest-risk phase of any incident:
the wrong action under pressure can turn a single-site outage into a regional one. Courses here teach
playbook-driven, reversible remediation. Each course confers a
[Skill](../../../../skills/remediation.md) and is examined by a
[Benchmark](../../../../benchmarks/resil-exam.md).

## Courses

| Code | Course | Level | Credits | Prereqs |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| [RESIL-210](courses/resil-210.md) | Remediation Playbooks | Core | 4 | RESIL-101 |

Part of the [School of Incident & Resilience](../../index.md).
